description: Inline SVG rendering: basic shapes, paths, text-in-SVG, gradient fills, clipPath, viewBox/preserveAspectRatio, complex polygon
visual_assertions: The basic shapes SVG should display a blue rectangle, a red circle, a green ellipse, and a yellow diagonal line
The path SVG should display a purple quadratic bezier curve and an orange triangle
The text-in-SVG section should render 'Plain SVG text' in dark color and 'Bold red SVG text' in red
The gradient fills SVG should show a rect with a blue-to-purple horizontal gradient and a circle with a yellow-to-orange radial gradient
The clipPath SVG should show a purple rectangle clipped to a circular region
The viewBox meet SVG should preserve aspect ratio and show a circle centered in the viewport
The viewBox none SVG should stretch the circle to fill the entire viewport dimensions
The star polygon should render as a gold/yellow 10-pointed star shape with a darker border
